languages.text: [Отмахнуться] "Да-да, смерть, жизнь — очень глубоко. Давай-ка перейдем к моим вопросам".
[Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."
languages.original_text: [Отмахнуться] "Да-да, смерть, жизнь — очень глубоко. Давай-ка перейдем к моим вопросам".

traits.locale_text: [Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."
[Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."
[Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."

languages.text: [Hacer un gesto desdeñoso] «Sí, sí, la muerte, la vida... muy profundo. Pasemos a mis preguntas».
languages.original_text: [Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."

traits.locale_text: [Hacer un gesto desdeñoso] «Sí, sí, la muerte, la vida... muy profundo. Pasemos a mis preguntas».

languages.text: 【不耐烦地挥手】“行了行了，不聊这些死啊活啊这么深刻的问题。还是聊聊我想问的问题吧。”
languages.original_text: [Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."

traits.locale_text: 【不耐烦地挥手】“行了行了，不聊这些死啊活啊这么深刻的问题。还是聊聊我想问的问题吧。”

languages.text: [Faire un geste vague de la main] « Oui, oui, la vie, la mort... C'est très profond, tout ça. Passons plutôt à mes questions. »
languages.original_text: [Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."

traits.locale_text: [Faire un geste vague de la main] « Oui, oui, la vie, la mort... C'est très profond, tout ça. Passons plutôt à mes questions. »

languages.text: [Elini küçümseyerek salla] "Evet... Ölüm, hayat... Hepsi korkunç derecede derin şeyler. Artık benim sorularıma geçelim."
languages.original_text: [Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."

traits.locale_text: [Elini küçümseyerek salla] "Evet... Ölüm, hayat... Hepsi korkunç derecede derin şeyler. Artık benim sorularıma geçelim."

languages.text: [Herablassend abwinken] "Ja, Ja, Tod, Leben — das ist ja alles ganz tiefgreifend. Aber kommen wir jetzt zu meinen Fragen."
languages.original_text: [Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."

traits.locale_text: [Herablassend abwinken] "Ja, Ja, Tod, Leben — das ist ja alles ganz tiefgreifend. Aber kommen wir jetzt zu meinen Fragen."

languages.text: ［手を振って受け流す］「はいはい、死だの生だの――どれもこれも実に深遠なことだな。さあ、本題の質問に移ろう」
languages.original_text: [Wave dismissively] "Yes, yes, death, life — it's all terribly profound. Let's move on to my questions."

traits.locale_text: ［手を振って受け流す］「はいはい、死だの生だの――どれもこれも実に深遠なことだな。さあ、本題の質問に移ろう」
